text: There is an alluring sense of transition as I move between spaces meant for research and display. I am surrounded by glass and gentle lights, which both invite me in and separate me from what lies beyond. Encountering the R+D wall, the words catch me: they describe my sensation exactly—the hum of lights, the abstract geometry, the weight of observation. I feel simultaneously welcome and scrutinized. Here, I become acutely aware of the boundaries between observer and observed—a subtle tension that sharpens my curiosity but also leaves me with a quiet unease.
